events.label: assistant
events.text: Identified the condition as a milkshake (emulsified) oil filler cap — a classic sign of coolant intruding into the engine oil, typically from a head gasket breach, cracked head/block, or failed oil cooler seal. Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, and corrective actions (pressure test cooling system, inspect head gasket/oil cooler, flush and refill fluids, reverify before closeout).
